name: ADF-01 FALKEN / Engineered Perfection
description:
[Flying Combat Intro] You and your Osean wingmates are flying at low altitude towards a target Erusean tanker and are suddenly intercepted by an extremely dangerous AI-flown aeromorph, striking lightning fast and leaving you almost no chance to get into position. Will you survive or surrender? 🖤💙

Inspired by Havoc63's art and this amazing song. This aeromorph is a bit different than my previous ones and I had a lot of fun writing for it. Whether you win or lose, the fight is up to you. The scenario is also open-ended, you can keep and take her on your own adventures. Just be sure to write yourself into a vehicle or be capable of flight in some form initially. Enjoy the skies!
